attribution.changes: Statements formalized (translated) into Lean 4 by parZer; proofs are conditional on the disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: On strengthenings of the intersecting shadow theorem

license.label: cc0 — full Lean file available under commission

nodes.label: TIntersecting
nodes.lean: def TIntersecting (t : ℕ) (F : Finset (Finset ℕ)) : Prop := ∀ A ∈ F, ∀ B ∈ F, t ≤ (A ∩ B).card

nodes.label: IsSemistar
nodes.lean: def IsSemistar (t : ℕ) (F : Finset (Finset ℕ)) : Prop := ∃ D : Finset ℕ, D.card = t + 1 ∧ ∀ A ∈ F, t ≤ (A ∩ D).card

nodes.label: franklA
nodes.lean: def franklA (h n k t : ℕ) : Finset (Finset ℕ) := ((Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k).filter (fun A => t + h ≤ (A ∩ Finset.Icc 1 (t + 2 * h)).card)

nodes.citation: Sperner (Prop 1.1) \cite{S} ; the elementary shadow-ratio lower bound eq:1.1
nodes.label: lem_sperner
nodes.lean: theorem lem_sperner : ∀ (n k j : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), F.Nonempty → F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → 0 < j → j < k → (Finset.shadow^[j] F).card * Nat.choose n k ≥ Nat.choose n (k - j) * F.card := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_katona
nodes.lean: theorem lem_katona : ∀ (n k t l : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), F.Nonempty → F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → TIntersecting t F → k - t ≤ l → l < k → (Finset.shadow^[k - l] F).card * Nat.choose (2 * k - t) k ≥ Nat.choose (2 * k - t) l * F.card := by sorry

nodes.citation: Frankl (Prop 2.2) \cite{F78} ; eq:2.1 structural property of shifted t-intersecting families
nodes.label: lem_frankl_2_2
nodes.lean: theorem lem_frankl_2_2 : ∀ (n k t : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → IsShifted F → TIntersecting t F → ∀ A ∈ F, ∃ h : ℕ, h ≤ k - t ∧ t + h ≤ (A ∩ Finset.Icc 1 (t + 2 * h)).card := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_lem_2_9
nodes.lean: theorem thm_lem_2_9 : ∀ (t j : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), IsPseudoTIntersecting t F → 0 < j → j ≤ t → (Finset.shadow^[j] F).card ≥ (restrictedShadow j F).card := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_2_11
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_2_11 : ∀ (t j h w r : ℕ), 0 < j → j < t → h < w → 1 ≤ r → r ≤ w → (Nat.choose (t + 2 * h) (t + h - j) * Nat.choose (t + 2 * w) (t + w) > Nat.choose (t + 2 * w) (t + w - j) * Nat.choose (t + 2 * h) (t + h)) ∧ (Nat.choose (t + 2 * w) (t + w - j + r) * Nat.choose (t + 2 * w) (t + w) > Nat.choose (t + 2 * w) (t + w - j) * Nat.choose (t + 2 * w) (t + w + r)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_th_2_10
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_2_10 : ∀ (n k t j w : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → IsShifted F → IsPseudoTIntersecting t F → familyWidth t F = w → 0 < j → j ≤ t → (restrictedShadow j F).card * Nat.choose (t + 2 * w) (t + w) ≥ F.card * Nat.choose (t + 2 * w) (t - j + w) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_3_1
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_3_1 : ∀ (n k t : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → IsShifted F → TIntersecting t F → familyWidth t F = k - t → IsPseudoTIntersecting (t + 1) (F \ (Finset.Icc 1 (2 * k - t)).powersetCard k) ∧ familyWidth (t + 1) (F \ (Finset.Icc 1 (2 * k - t)).powersetCard k) ≤ k - t - 2 := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_th_1_4
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_1_4 : ∀ (n k t j : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → TIntersecting t F → 1 ≤ j → j < t → t < k → k < n → (k + t + 1 - j) * F.card ≥ Nat.choose (2 * k - t) k * (k + 2 * t + 1 - 2 * j) → (Finset.shadow^[j] F).card * Nat.choose (2 * (k - 1) - t) (k - 1) ≥ Nat.choose (2 * (k - 1) - t) (k - 1 - j) * F.card := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_prop_5_3
nodes.lean: theorem thm_prop_5_3 : ∀ (n k t j : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), 1 < j → j < t → (F.Nonempty → F ⊆ franklA 0 n k t ∪ franklA 1 n k t → (Finset.shadow^[j] F).card * (t + 2) ≥ Nat.choose (t + 2) (j + 1) * F.card) ∧ (F.Nonempty → F ⊆ franklA 0 n k t → (Finset.shadow^[j] F).card * (franklA 0 n k t).card ≥ (Finset.shadow^[j] (franklA 0 n k t)).card * F.card ∧ (Finset.shadow^[j] (franklA 0 n k t)).card > Nat.choose t j * (franklA 0 n k t).card) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_th_5_5
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_5_5 : ∀ (n k t j : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → TIntersecting t F → IsSemistar t F → 1 < j → j < t → (Finset.shadow^[j] F).card * (t + 2) ≥ Nat.choose (t + 2) (j + 1) * F.card := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_cor_6_3
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_6_3 : ∀ (n k t j : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), (k - t + 1) * (t + 1) ≤ n → k ≤ 2 * t → 1 ≤ j → j < t → F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → TIntersecting t F → (franklA 1 n k t).card < F.card → (Finset.shadow^[j] F).card * (franklA 0 n k t).card ≥ (Finset.shadow^[j] (franklA 0 n k t)).card * F.card ∧ (Finset.shadow^[j] (franklA 0 n k t)).card > Nat.choose t j * (franklA 0 n k t).card := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_th_6_7
nodes.lean: theorem thm_th_6_7 : ∀ (n k t j : ℕ), ∀ F : Finset (Finset ℕ), F ⊆ (Finset.Icc 1 n).powersetCard k → IsShifted F → TIntersecting t F → ¬ F ⊆ franklA 1 n k t → t + 1 ≤ baseSizeAt (t + 1) F → 1 ≤ j → j < t → (Finset.shadow^[j] F).card > Nat.choose t j * F.card := by sorry

title: On strengthenings of the intersecting shadow theorem
